Cses._comment: Service-account PHPSESSID used to scrape solved tasks. Do NOT commit a real value; set it via user-secrets or the Cses__SessionCookie environment variable.

Codeforces._comment: API key/secret for authorized methods (gym standings). SessionCookie is the logged-in codeforces.com cookie header used to scrape gym problem statements (gym pages 403 without it). Do NOT commit real values; set via user-secrets or Codeforces__Key / Codeforces__Secret / Codeforces__SessionCookie env vars.
